name: InputStoryContentVideo
description: Describes a video to post as a story.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of the content, must be video

fields.name: video
fields.description: The video to post as a story. The video must be of the size 720x1280, streamable, encoded with H.265 codec, with key frames added each second in the MPEG4 format, and must not exceed 30 MB. The video can't be reused and can only be uploaded as a new file, so you can pass “attach://<file_attach_name>” if the video was uploaded using multipart/form-data under <file_attach_name>. More information on Sending Files »

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Precise duration of the video in seconds; 0-60

fields.name: cover_frame_timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp in seconds of the frame that will be used as the static cover for the story. Defaults to 0.0.

fields.name: is_animation
fields.description: Pass True if the video has no sound
